NAME: Gutenberg Health Study
DESCRIPTION: Population-based cohort from Mainz with cardiovascular focus, omics, and imaging; genome-wide data support GWAS on cardiometabolic and related traits.
MANUAL_CITATION: Wild, P. S., Zeller, T., Beutel, M., Blettner, M., Dugi, K. A., Durek, P., ... & Blankenberg, S. (2012). The Gutenberg Health Study. Bundesgesundheitsblatt - Gesundheitsforschung - Gesundheitsschutz, 55(6), 824-829.
